evals.description: Creates a deck when a complete brief is provided
evals.input: Create an enablement deck for WhatsApp Business Calling. Audience: existing customers on Pro plan. Format: 30-min webinar. Outcome: customers set up calling and make their first call.

evals.description: Asks for missing context when brief is incomplete
evals.input: Create an enablement deck for AI Support Agent.

evals.description: Loads launch context file if it exists
evals.input: Create a deck for the campaigns launch.

evals.description: Runs brand audit after generating deck
evals.input: Create an enablement deck for Instagram DMs. Audience: new customers. Format: onboarding call.
The deck looks good but the best practices slide felt too generic.

expect.updates: launches context or flags skill improvement
